candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary row, but nothing in the label ties it specifically to COGS or cost of sales; adding it to the COGS bucket selected as 'Material and purchased services' would risk misclassification.

candidates.row_label: Amortisation attributable to acquired surplus values

variables.notes: The selected COGS reference bucket is only 'Material and purchased services'. The visible D&A rows are separate operating expense lines with no indication they belong specifically to COGS. To avoid misallocation and double counting, no COGS-specific D&A row should be added separately.

candidates.why: This is the operating depreciation summary row and appears separate from the selected XSGA component rows ('Other External Costs', 'Personnel Costs', 'Other operating expenses'). The component rows beneath it indicate it is a summary total and should be preferred over its parts.
Appears to be a component of 'Depreciation excluding acquired surplus values' based on row order and values, so it should not be chosen when the summary row exists.

candidates.why: Also appears to be a component of 'Depreciation excluding acquired surplus values'; included as a candidate because it is in the excerpt, but should not be selected separately when the summary row exists.

candidates.row_label: Amortisation attributable to acquired surplus values
candidates.why: This is the operating amortisation summary row and appears separate from the selected XSGA component rows. The rows beneath it reconcile to this total, so it should be chosen instead of its components.
Appears to be a component of the amortisation summary row rather than a standalone add-on when the summary total is available.

candidates.row_label: Amortisation attributable to acquired surplus value - Balancing value

final_choice.row_label: Amortisation attributable to acquired surplus values

variables.notes: The selected XSGA reference bucket consists of 'Other External Costs', 'Personnel Costs', and 'Other operating expenses', and earlier mapping explicitly excluded depreciation/amortization. The statement presents depreciation and amortisation as separate same-level operating rows before EBIT, so they should be added separately to XSGA. Summary rows are selected to avoid double counting their components.
